Explanation: The university with 23,819 undergraduate applicants in 2022 is the University of Oxford [76175]. The process described—iron-dependent, distinct from necrosis—is ferroptosis. Searches for a female Oxford researcher working on ferroptosis, who did her undergraduate at an all-women's university in Asia, did not yield any evidence of such a researcher or any PubMed-listed papers with "ferroptosis" in the title authored by her before 2023. This matches the findings of other agents, and no contrary evidence was found.
